final:
module sram16 (
    input wire [15:0] D,
    input wire [3:0] ADDR,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [15:0] Q
);
    reg [15:0] unused_memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit unused_memory

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            unused_memory[ADDR] <= D;  // Write data to unused_memory
        end else begin
            Q <= unused_memory[ADDR];  // Read data from unused_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
